column3: The overall sampling session or campaign event in which one or more individual sample extractions were carried out.
Document Note: Sampling Event Model Overview

column1: Document Note: Sampling Event Model Overview
column3: This model defines a broader Sampling Event (E7) that groups shared metadata (who, when, where, why, and documentation) for one or more individual sample extraction activities. Each extraction is represented as a nested S2: Sample Taking event linked from the Sampling Event. This allows shared context to be captured once, while extraction-specific links (object, sample site, removed sample, and observation) are recorded per individual Sample Taking event.
A textual or digital document recording information related to the sampling process, results, or reasoning.
A defined sampling protocol or procedure that may be referenced for standard approaches.
The actor (individual or organisation) responsible for carrying out or authorising the sampling activity.
The physical place where the sampling activity occurred, typically within an institution or laboratory.
The individual event of taking a sample.
A human-made work of art that forms the physical source object from which the sample is taken.
The individual event of taking a sample.
